channel.title: Discover South Lake Union Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for Discover South Lake Union Events

item.title: Bake and Destroy Pop-Up
item.description:
Friday, March 27, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Fairview Market Hall, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Local, made-from-scratch cookies? Say less.

Event details

item.title: 2026 Spring Fling Sailing Regatta
item.description:
Saturday, March 28, 2026 at 9:30 AM

Location: The Center for Wooden Boats, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

The Spring Fling Regatta celebrates the coming of Spring in the Pacific Northwest!

item.title: JazzED Jamboree
item.description:
Saturday, March 28, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Seattle JazzED, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

The JazzED Jamboree is a celebration to bring students and families together to mark the end of a successful quarter!

item.description:
Saturday, March 28, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: MOHAI, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

item.title: Petals & Prints
item.description:
Saturday, March 28, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Studio Forma, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

item.title: Glazer's Video Fundamentals - Part 1
item.description:
Sunday, March 29, 2026 at 12:30 PM

Location: Glazer's Camera, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

This is a technically-focused class that will teach you the fundamentals of shooting video on a digital camera!

Event details

item.title: The Market Hall Egg Hunt
item.description:
Monday, March 30, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Fairview Market Hall, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA
